commitResults.messageBody:
Help command can be paired with a
command word to learn more about
that specific command.

For example, 'help todo' will
show todo syntax and example usage.

Help messages for bye, list, mark, unmark,
delete, and find.

Usage and example usage are included for
each command.

commitResults.messageTitle: Show error message when task file is corrupted.
commitResults.messageBody:
A new class, TaskParseResult is added to encapsulate the
result of parsing a task file. This class contains the
list of tasks that were successfully parsed and a list of
error messages.

CommandParser.extractParameters() can be used to create
a mapping of (parameter name, value) from a string of parameters.

commitResults.messageTitle: Modify delete, mark, and unmark to work with keywords.
commitResults.messageBody:
If the parameter provided to delete, mark, and unmark commands
are not non-negative integers, then they will instead try to find
tasks with names that match the parameter.

If there is exactly 1 matching task, then that will be the task
that will be subjected to the command.

commitResults.messageTitle: Add extra leniency to command syntax.
commitResults.messageBody:
Spaces right after a slash will be ignored. Instead, the first
word encountered after a slash will be taken as the parameter
name.

For example: '/from' and '/    from' are both treated as '/from'.

commitResults.messageTitle: Wrap lines that are too long

commitResults.messageBody:
When deleting/marking/unmarking, if the keyword
provided matches exactly with one or more tasks,
then the command will be applied to all of those
tasks.

Partial matches, on the other hand, only allow for
1 match. This is to prevent the user from accidentally
typing 'delete a' and deleting half their tasks.

commitResults.messageTitle: Change some messages to fit personality better
Display greeting messages sequentially with delay in-between

Update error message for parse failure

commitResults.messageBody:
User is now encapsulated inside its own class.
A user has a name and a color. This color will
be used to set the text fill color of usernames
in dialog boxes.

Add CommandHistory class to record history of commands that were entered
Integrate command history to main window
Tell user about command history feature in greeting message
Fix scroll speeding up as new messages are added.
commitResults.messageBody:
The mistake was the result of a miscalculation of scroll height.
Before, the scrollable height was calculated using the content
height only (how tall all the dialog boxes are together). But
scrollable height should take into account the viewport height
as well. This commit rectifies that mistake.

commitResults.messageTitle: Revise README for improved user guidance
commitResults.messageBody: Updated the README to enhance clarity and detail about the app's features and interactions.
